content: The 2025 iteration of the configurable ICM curiosity mechanism can be repurposed to actively map an LLM agent’s working memory capacity limits during multi-step reasoning, by generating targeted novel state transitions that probe exactly when the agent loses access to earlier task-critical information. This creates an intrinsic reward for probing the boundaries of working memory that avoids the distribution shift of manually curated reasoning test sets.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
